zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期横盘偏强，潜在上行动能逐步显现
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD价格在1636美元附近小幅震荡，全天波动有限，显示市场短期情绪相对平稳。结合20日简单移动平均线(SMA20)位于1615美元，价格略高于均线，短期趋势呈现偏多结构，但缺乏明显加速信号。

MACD指标当前值为12.26，但信号线未完全计算，显示动能存在潜在增强空间。若MACD快速线上穿信号线，将可能触发短线买入信号。同时，RSI数据缺失，需结合价格行为判断超买超卖状态，暂时维持中性偏多观点。

支撑位关注近期低点1631美元，若价格下破该水平，可能引发回调压力。阻力位则在日内高点1639美元及关键心理整数位1650美元附近，突破这些位置有望带来进一步上涨空间。投资者可关注突破后的顺势建仓机会。

综合来看，短线操作可采取逢低轻仓买入、稳健者观望的策略，关注关键支撑与阻力反应。风险控制上，设置止损位于1630美元下方，以防突发利空波动。市场整体偏强，但需密切跟踪成交量和技术指标确认趋势延续性。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading at 1636.17, holding slightly above its 20-day simple moving average of 1614.99, which suggests the broader short-term trend remains constructive. Price action is consolidating within a very narrow intraday range between 1631.16 and 1638.91, indicating a temporary balance between buyers and sellers. The modest 24-hour gain of 0.18% reflects limited momentum, but maintaining prices above the moving average continues to favor a mildly bullish outlook.

The MACD reading of 12.26 remains positive, signaling that bullish momentum is still present beneath the surface. Although the signal line is unavailable, a positive MACD value generally indicates that upward pressure has not fully dissipated. The absence of RSI data limits overbought or oversold assessment, making price structure and moving-average positioning more important. As long as ETH remains above the SMA(20), buyers retain a technical advantage despite the current consolidation phase.

From a support and resistance perspective, the immediate support zone lies around 1631–1635, corresponding to the recent session low and current consolidation area. A stronger support region can be identified near the SMA(20) around 1615. On the upside, resistance is emerging near 1639, followed by the psychologically important 1650 level. A decisive break above 1639 could encourage additional buying interest and open the path toward higher short-term targets.

Traders may consider maintaining a cautiously bullish stance while price remains above 1615. Momentum-focused participants could look for confirmation through a breakout above 1639 before initiating new long positions, targeting the 1650 area and beyond. More conservative traders may wait for a pullback toward support levels to improve risk-reward conditions. Conversely, a sustained move below 1615 would weaken the bullish structure and increase the probability of a deeper corrective phase.
